THEUNDERSTUDY-FALSE_MASK.title: False Mask
THEUNDERSTUDY-FALSE_MASK.description:
Start each combat [gold]Weak[/gold].
Select the first card of your initial hand.
THEUNDERSTUDY-FALSE_MASK.selectionPrompt: Select a card to add to your hand.
THEUNDERSTUDY-FALSE_MASK.flavor: The cost of knowing exactly what you need.
THEUNDERSTUDY-TRUE_MASK.title: True Mask
THEUNDERSTUDY-TRUE_MASK.description:
Start each combat with 2 [gold]Unweak[/gold].
Select the first 2 cards of your initial hand.
THEUNDERSTUDY-TRUE_MASK.selectionPrompt: Select 2 cards to add to your hand.
THEUNDERSTUDY-TRUE_MASK.flavor: What once weighed you down now lifts you up.
